mapper.insert: insert into task (pro_id , com_id , task_name , task_desc , task_status , pm_id , pm_id_name , task_start_date , task_end_date , task_created_at , task_updated_at) values(#{proId} , #{comId} , #{taskName} , #{taskDesc} , #{taskStatus} , #{pmId}, #{pmIdName}, #{taskStartDate}, #{taskEndDate}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update task set task_name = #{taskName}, task_desc = #{taskDesc}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, task_start_date = #{taskStartDate}, task_end_date = #{taskEndDate}, task_updated_at = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.task_status, t.task_created_at from task t where t.pro_id = #{proId} order by t.task_id desc

select t.task_id,t.pro_id,t.task_name,t.task_desc, t.task_status, t.pm_id_name, t.task_start_date, t.task_end_date from task t join project p on t.pro_id = p.pro_id join company c on p.com_id = c.com_id join project_member pi on pi.project_pro_id = p.pro_id and pi.pm_id = t.pm_id where t.task_id = #{taskID};
